data.body:
SCOPE AMENDMENT (brainstorm 2026-04-20)

This epic adds one new story to the core query layer: the ticket ready subcommand.

NEW STORY: ticket ready
- Command: ticket ready [--epic=<id>] [--story=<id>] [--format=llm]
- Surfaces all tickets whose ready_to_work = true (all direct blockers are closed or tombstoned).
- Uses the existing on-demand computation in ticket_graph/_graph.py:97-102 — no persistence changes.
- --epic scopes output to descendants of the specified epic.
- --story scopes output to descendants of the specified story.
- Thin-shim verb pattern: subcommand is a bash shim over the sourceable ticket-lib API (consistent with the pattern established by Epic 6f7a-4ba6 expansion).
- Output includes ticket id, type, title, priority, and (if available) assignee.

Inspired by beads (steveyegge/beads), which ships a native ready command as a core coordination primitive. DSO already has the underlying computation — this story exposes it as a CLI surface agents can query directly rather than via subprocess parsing of ticket deps.

Dependencies:
- Depends on 78fc-3858 (sourceable ticket-lib API) for thin-shim implementation consistency.

RERUN REQUIRED: preplanning must be rerun for this epic to generate the ticket ready story (plus any cross-cutting changes to existing stories). Complexity: MODERATE — one additive story, no reducer schema changes.
